series_metadata.series_title: Applications authorizing the selling of interment rights - Cemeteries
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, applications or correspondence related to the selling of interment rights.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Records maintained in paper form may be imaged and indexed a machine readable format. Upon confirmation that paper record is imaged and indexed properly, paper record shall be destroyed. ; Electronic: any records maintained in machine readable format, records shall be maintained two years from date of receipt by Division. ; Microform: any records maintained in microform, records shall be maintained two years from date of receipt by Division
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Recycle
